title: Vanilla Core
description: Modpack to experience vanilla Sourvival at its best
body:
### Vanilla Core – The Ultimate Vanilla+ Minecraft Experience


**What it does:**
Vanilla Core is a lightweight, carefully curated modpack designed to enhance the pure Vanilla Minecraft experience without altering its core mechanics. It focuses on performance improvements, visual polish, and subtle quality-of-life upgrades — all while keeping the gameplay 100% Vanilla-friendly. No extra biomes, no tech trees, no progression changes — just Minecraft, refined.

**Why you should download it:**
	•	Ideal for players who love classic Minecraft, but want it smoother, faster, and more user-friendly.
	•	Includes essential client-side mods for FPS boosts, cleaner UI, better controls, and optional visual enhancements (shader-ready).
	•	Plug-and-play setup — no tweaking required. Works great in singleplayer or on Vanilla-compatible servers.
